info.title: IMMZD18SHPV2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SHPV2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18SHPV2DosesVS

ValueSet-IMMZD18SHPV2DosesVS.title: IMMZD18SHPV2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD18SHPV2DosesVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SHPV2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Child's birth when client's biological sex is female-34
First HPV dose from the primary series was administered-112
Second HPV dose from the primary series was administered-112
Second HPV dose from the primary series was administered and client's HIV status is positive or client is immunocompromised-178
Third HPV dose from the primary series was administered-112

ValueSet-IMMZD18SHPV2DosesVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SHPV2Doses ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SHPV2DosesVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
